features.title: ProjectionLab-Style Figma Dashboard Layout
features.scope: Create a PlanLab investment dashboard in the local Nuxt architecture based on the provided HTML and TSX references, including shared financial projection logic, Chart.js asset trend with hover tooltip and quantitative axes, a homepage limited to total assets/trend/allocation, stocks settings and withdrawal planning with stock metrics, settings principal control, house planning with house metrics, annual details, and documented Figma workflow.
